query:
SELECT 
  external_id, contract_no, paid_at, amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid')) as principal_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid')) as interest_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount')) as close_installment_amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid')) as penalty_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid')) as fee_paid
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) LIKE '%จบงวด%'
LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
  external_id, contract_no, paid_at, amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid')) as principal_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid')) as interest_paid,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount')) as close_installment_amount,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid')) as penalty_paid
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) NOT LIKE '%จบงวด%'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) != ''
LIMIT 5;
